name: Ventrue
description: The self-styled rulers of vampire society, masters of control, who believe it is their birthright to lead. Venture typically Embrace mortals with greatness and potential.

bane.summary: Bane: Arrogance - Ventrue pride themselves on feeding from the best. Ventrue suffer from a psychosomatic curse: they have two feeding preferences: one related to their ideals, another to their shame. For example: an ancient Ventrue might be able to feed only from either those born to noble families, or hookers. An anarchist Ventrue might feed from true revolutionaries, or from extreme racists.

name: Veneris
description: The main competitors of the Ventrue, this clan is fiercely stubborn. Veneris typically Embrace brutal social darwinists. They are known to ruin their potential Embracee’s lives, to “test” whether they are cut out for the Clan.

bane.summary: Bane: Possession - if the Veneris feeds from a mortal victim that was fed on by another vampire, or another vampire feeds from someone the Veneris fed from, it suffers 1 Health damage, maximum 1 damage per mortal, and maximum 6 damage per night. If a significant resource of the Veneris is taken or given to another supernatural, it suffers 1 Willpower damage.

name: Toreador
description: Toreador are connoisseurs of ascendant beauty and emotion, drawn irresistibly to the artistic and the sublime. Toreador typically Embrace out of passion, or to preserve a beautiful thing.

bane.summary: Bane: Infatuation - while interacting with them, the vampire can become obsessed with a mortal, desiring to spend time with them, to sponsor them, but most of all: to feed from them. This usually ends with the mortal dead, which causes significant Willpower damage. There can be only one obsession at a time.

name: Nosferatu
description: Nosferatu are the hidden eyes and ears of the vampire world, cursed with a grotesque appearance that separates them from mortal society. Nosferatu typically Embrace the vain, the dedicated, or the rejected.

bane.summary: Bane: Horrid Form - the Embrace visually disfigures the Nosferatu. They suffer appropriate penalties to positive interaction with mortals, usually between -2 and -4 dice. This also causes envy, and Resolve or Composure rolls against persuasion, performance, leadership or subterfuge by beautiful characters, or to resist frenzy against them, suffer a -2 dice penalty.

name: Brujah
description: The philosophers, fighters, rebels, gladiators. Brujah typically Embrace the brave. The Clan has a history for great thinkers, generals, and revolutionaries.

bane.summary: Bane: Wrathful - Brujah receive a dice penalty to resist rage Frenzy, between -2 and -5 depending on the situation, and take double Willpower damage from insults, unless they react violently.

name: Gangrel
description: These wild vampires are described as closest to their Beast, but they maintain they are simply best at interacting with it. Gangrel typically Embrace survivors, explorers, and those who defy prescribed destiny.

bane.summary: Bane: Gluttonous - in every feeding where the vampire does not wish to drain the victim, they must roll Willpower vs their Hunger +2. The consequences inflict Willpower damage.

name: Malkavian
description: Afflicted by a supernatural madness, the clan of seers and oracles are the most heterogeneous. They are Embraced from academics, psychologists, prophets, and other strange geniuses.

bane.summary: Bane: Distorted Reality - Malkavians suffer from some mental illness or delusion. Choose 2 triggers, each either emotional or situational. Resisting Discipline powers which create delusions incurs a -1 dice penalty.
